name: MW Creme De Menthe Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Creme de cocoa or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the chocolate syrup in a bowl.
2. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a greased bundt pan for MW cooking.
3. Mix the chocolate syrup with the remaining batter and pour over the batter in the pan. Do not stir it in.
4. Cook on full power for 10-11 minutes or until the cake pulls away from the edges of the pan.
5. Remove from the oven and let stand for 5-10 minutes before turning out onto a cake stand.
6. Place wax paper over the cake while cooling.
